title: Fit test - Onboarding Flow - Start Fit Test
scenario: Fit Test onboarding flow does not display the Position screen when Test button is clicked from Device Settings > Onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a supported device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) connected.
2. Go to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Onboarding.
3. Navigate to the Fit Test screen (located after Pairing 2 screen).
expected: The first screen of the Fit Test flow is displayed (the Position screen).
